name: National Merit Scholarship
description: Merit-based scholarship for high-achieving undergraduate students. Supports students with strong academic records across multiple fields.
nextStep: Review official eligibility criteria and prepare academic transcripts for application.

name: First Generation Student Grant
description: Financial support for students who are the first in their family to attend college or university.
nextStep: Gather proof of first-generation status and family income documentation.

name: Women in STEM Fellowship
description: Supports women pursuing degrees in science, technology, engineering, and mathematics.
nextStep: Submit academic records and a statement of purpose through the official portal.

name: Disability Access Education Fund
description: Provides fee waivers and support services for students with documented disabilities.
nextStep: Obtain disability certificate from authorized medical authority and apply online.

name: Low-Income Rural Student Scholarship
description: Targeted support for students from rural areas with limited family income pursuing higher education.
nextStep: Verify rural residence proof and income certificate with local education office.
